summary: Authored 02-architecture/SAD.md (482 lines) for taskq: 3-paragraph architecture overview, the 6 CRG principles embedded verbatim plus their 4-directory mapping, four full module specifications (cli/store/executor/config) with file layout + hub functions, four data flows (submit ok / run ok / timeout+retry / corruption), exit-code table with the no-silent-try/except rule, stdlib technology table, SAB YAML with real values (phase=2 int, 4 layers, 3 NFRs with p95<50ms and >=95 raise-gate floors, 4 architecture_constraints, executor+store as high-risk), and a 25-test cross-reference mapping each test from SRS §8 to its primary/secondary modules with P3 test-file estimates.
